title: Core Banking Trade Finance System (TFS)
lead: Subject Matter Expert (SME) and Project Lead bridging business requirements, technology, and end-users.
overview: Directed system developers on functional design, system architecture, and end-to-end trade finance workflows. Managed the entire project lifecycle including scope definition, milestone tracking, risk management, and cross-team coordination.
challenge: The new Trade Finance platform required strict adherence to Saudi regulations, internal banking policies, and SAMA requirements, while migrating massive amounts of legacy data without corruption.
solution: Defined and reviewed BRDs and functional specifications. Oversaw rigorous data cleansing, mapping, and UAT coordination to deliver an end-user-friendly, fast, and 100% compliant banking system.

title: Trade Finance & KYC Automation Suite
lead: Delivered robust data processing, validation, tracking, and reporting tools for Trade Finance operations.
overview: Developed comprehensive, customized Excel VBA solutions capable of automatically generating highly regulated documents, including KYC forms, compliance approval histories, and operational file summaries.
challenge: Corporate clients were spending excessive man-hours manually drafting compliance documentation, increasing the risk of data entry errors and audit penalties.
solution: Built custom data import/export systems featuring structured logging and audit-ready record management, eliminating manual drafting and reducing processing times by over 80%.

title: Document Management System (DMS)
lead: Engineered a secure, Python-based desktop Document Management System with multi-tier access and MS OneDrive cloud integration.
overview: Designed and deployed a standalone Python executable (.exe) DMS featuring robust user authentication (Admin, Inputter, Viewer roles). The system manages client databases, registers documents with unique tracking IDs, and automatically syncs scanned soft copies directly to a shared MS OneDrive cloud folder.
challenge: Organizations required a highly secure, restricted-access desktop application to manage unstructured file storage, prevent unauthorized access, and securely backup records without relying on complex, expensive server infrastructure.
solution: Programmed a complete desktop solution equipped with hardware-level device authorization and an online app activation system. Included automated Excel reporting for both client and document lists, plus a one-click backup routing system to guarantee data integrity.

title: AI Minutes of Meeting (MOM) Recorder
lead: An intelligent voice-recording application that automatically transcribes live meetings into English and Arabic text.
overview: Designed a sophisticated Python desktop executable that records live meeting audio and uses AI transcription to instantly generate bilingual text summaries for official minutes. The software includes a secure login portal and online device activation.
challenge: Corporate teams were losing critical details and man-hours manually typing minutes of meetings, especially in fast-paced bilingual (Arabic/English) enterprise environments.
solution: Deployed a secure, licensed desktop app that autonomously records, transcribes, translates, and saves organized meeting records into designated local folders, fully protected by a custom authentication system.

title: Islamic Prayer Time & Athan Reminder
lead: A lightweight Python executable that provides accurate 5-time daily Islamic prayer alerts with customizable Athan audio.
overview: Developed and published a free, standalone desktop application that calculates accurate daily prayer times. It runs seamlessly in the background and triggers audible Athan notifications precisely on schedule.
challenge: Users needed an unobtrusive, offline-capable desktop utility for prayer reminders without relying on ad-heavy mobile apps or browser extensions while working on their PCs.
solution: Engineered a reliable Python-based `.exe` that sits in the system tray, plays custom Athan sounds on time, and is published publicly for free on my GitHub repository.

title: Dynamic Hijri Calendar & Converter
lead: A standalone desktop application for seamless Hijri-to-Gregorian date conversion and live calendar tracking.
overview: Programmed a comprehensive calendar utility in Python that provides full Hijri calendar views and instant date conversions. The application automatically fetches online updates to ensure perfect lunar alignment.
challenge: Corporate and personal users frequently struggle with accurate Hijri-Gregorian date conversions due to regional moon-sighting variations and disjointed online tools.
solution: Packaged a lightweight `.exe` that utilizes online synchronization to provide flawlessly accurate date conversions and calendar views, published freely on GitHub.

title: HR & Operations Workflow Trackers
lead: Automated human resources tracking, including attendance systems and staff records.
overview: Built end-to-end operational workflow management tools tailored to client HR departments, enabling them to monitor staff performance, process payroll data, and map operational bottlenecks.
challenge: Manual tracking of employee records and attendance led to severe payroll bottlenecks, inaccurate reporting, and administrative friction.
solution: Developed dynamic tracking dashboards that calculated attendance metrics autonomously and provided HR managers with instant, reliable data visualization.

title: Security & Productivity Applications
lead: Developed offline security utilities and event-driven productivity planners.
overview: Created a suite of custom desktop utilities including encrypted password lockers, automatic password generators, event diary planners, and schedule generators.
challenge: Clients required highly secure, offline methods for credential management and automated scheduling without relying on expensive, cloud-based third-party SaaS subscriptions.
solution: Programmed encrypted VBA data vaults and integrated Microsoft Outlook automation to trigger scheduled notifications, auto-emails, and calendar reminders natively.

title: Modern Business Portfolios & Websites
lead: Completed multiple website development projects focusing on performance, usability, and modern design standards.
overview: Engineered highly responsive, professional websites tailored to client specifications. Focused on cross-device compatibility, modern aesthetic layouts, and interactive user experiences.
challenge: Clients required fast-loading, visually appealing digital storefronts that adhered to modern mobile-first design and SEO standards.
solution: Delivered custom-coded web environments with clean architecture, intuitive navigation, and high-conversion layouts tailored specifically to each client's industry.
